allow: PowerShell(Set-Location "D:\\1"; Write-Output "PWD: $\(\(Get-Location\).Path\)"; Write-Output "=== .design-sync ==="; if \(Test-Path ".design-sync"\) { Get-ChildItem ".design-sync" -Force | Select-Object Name } else { "no .design-sync dir" }; Write-Output "=== legacy config ==="; if \(Test-Path "design-sync.config.json"\) { "EXISTS" } else { "none" }; Write-Output "=== git repo? ==="; if \(Test-Path ".git"\) { ".git present" } else { "no .git" }; Write-Output "=== git on path? ==="; if \(Get-Command git -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\) { "git available" } else { "git NOT on PATH" })

PowerShell(Set-Location "D:\\1"; Write-Output "=== frontend/src ==="; Get-ChildItem "frontend/src" -Force -Recurse -Depth 1 | Select-Object FullName | ForEach-Object { $_.FullName.Replace\("D:\\1\\frontend\\",""\) })

PowerShell(Set-Location "D:\\1"; Write-Output "=== .claude tree ==="; Get-ChildItem ".claude" -Force -Recurse | Select-Object @{n='Path';e={$_.FullName.Replace\("D:\\1\\.claude\\",""\)}}, Length, LastWriteTime)
PowerShell(npm *)

PowerShell($mysql="D:\\mysql-8.0.43-winx64\\bin\\mysql.exe"; foreach \($p in @\("Missyou1314","Missyou1314...","123456","root",""\)\) { $env:MYSQL_PWD=$p; $r = & $mysql -u root -e "SELECT 1;" 2>&1; if \($LASTEXITCODE -eq 0\) { Write-Output "OK -> password is: '$p'"; break } else { Write-Output "FAIL -> '$p'" } })

PowerShell($mysql="D:\\mysql-8.0.43-winx64\\bin\\mysql.exe"; $env:MYSQL_PWD="missyou1314..."; $r = & $mysql -u root -e "SELECT 1 AS ok;" 2>&1; if \($LASTEXITCODE -eq 0\) { Write-Output "LOGIN OK"; Write-Output "=== db exists? ==="; & $mysql -u root -e "SHOW DATABASES LIKE 'sd_publish_scm';" 2>&1 } else { Write-Output "LOGIN FAIL"; $r })

PowerShell(Set-Location "D:\\1\\backend"; $py=".venv\\Scripts\\python.exe"; Write-Output "=== venv python ==="; & $py --version 2>&1; Write-Output "=== import app.main ==="; & $py -c "import app.main; print\('IMPORT OK'\)" 2>&1)

PowerShell(Set-Location "D:\\1\\backend"; if \(Test-Path "backend_run.log"\) { Remove-Item "backend_run.log" -Force }; $p = Start-Process -FilePath ".venv\\Scripts\\python.exe" -ArgumentList "-m","uvicorn","app.main:app","--host","127.0.0.1","--port","8000" -RedirectStandardOutput "backend_run.log" -RedirectStandardError "backend_err.log" -PassThru -WindowStyle Hidden; Write-Output "started PID $\($p.Id\)"; Start-Sleep -Seconds 6; Write-Output "=== err log ==="; if \(Test-Path "backend_err.log"\) { Get-Content "backend_err.log" -Tail 30 }; Write-Output "=== out log ==="; if \(Test-Path "backend_run.log"\) { Get-Content "backend_run.log" -Tail 15 })

PowerShell(Write-Output "=== health ==="; try { \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8000/api/v1/health" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10\).Content } catch { "HEALTH ERR: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" }; Write-Output "=== login ==="; try { $body = "username=leader&password=123456"; $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8000/api/v1/auth/login" -Method POST -Body $body -ContentType "application/x-www-form-urlencoded" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10; $r.Content } catch { "LOGIN ERR: $\($_.Exception.Message\)"; if \($_.Exception.Response\) { $sr = New-Object System.IO.StreamReader\($_.Exception.Response.GetResponseStream\(\)\); $sr.ReadToEnd\(\) } })

PowerShell(Set-Location "D:\\1"; Write-Output "=== init.sql enum-ish inserts ==="; Select-String -Path "init.sql" -Pattern "role|status|action|leader|staff|normal|draft|pending|approved|rejected|approve|reject" -SimpleMatch -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 30 | ForEach-Object { "$\($_.LineNumber\): $\($_.Line.Trim\(\)\)" }; Write-Output "=== actual DB distinct values ==="; $mysql="D:\\mysql-8.0.43-winx64\\bin\\mysql.exe"; $env:MYSQL_PWD="missyou1314..."; & $mysql -u root -e "USE sd_publish_scm; SELECT DISTINCT role FROM sys_user; SELECT DISTINCT status FROM biz_contract; SELECT DISTINCT action FROM biz_approval;" 2>&1)
PowerShell(Remove-Item *)

PowerShell($r=Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8000/api/v1/auth/login" -Method POST -Body "username=leader&password=123456" -ContentType "application/x-www-form-urlencoded" -UseBasicParsing; Write-Output "=== raw login response ==="; $r.Content)

PowerShell(Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Net.Http; $c=New-Object System.Net.Http.HttpClient; $content=New-Object System.Net.Http.StringContent\("username=leader&password=123456",[System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8,"application/x-www-form-urlencoded"\); $resp=$c.PostAsync\("http://127.0.0.1:8000/api/v1/auth/login",$content\).Result; $bytes=$resp.Content.ReadAsByteArrayAsync\(\).Result; $utf8=[System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetString\($bytes\); Write-Output "=== UTF-8 decoded full_name ==="; \($utf8|ConvertFrom-Json\).user.full_name; Write-Output "=== ports still listening ==="; "8000: "+\(\(Test-NetConnection 127.0.0.1 -Port 8000 -WarningAction SilentlyContinue\).TcpTestSucceeded\); "5173: "+\(\(Test-NetConnection 127.0.0.1 -Port 5173 -WarningAction SilentlyContinue\).TcpTestSucceeded\); "3306: "+\(\(Test-NetConnection 127.0.0.1 -Port 3306 -WarningAction SilentlyContinue\).TcpTestSucceeded\))

PowerShell("MySQL 3306: "+\(\(Test-NetConnection 127.0.0.1 -Port 3306 -WarningAction SilentlyContinue\).TcpTestSucceeded\); "Backend 8000: "+\(\(Test-NetConnection 127.0.0.1 -Port 8000 -WarningAction SilentlyContinue\).TcpTestSucceeded\); "Frontend 5173: "+\(\(Test-NetConnection 127.0.0.1 -Port 5173 -WarningAction SilentlyContinue\).TcpTestSucceeded\))

PowerShell(Set-Location "D:\\1\\backend"; $conns = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; foreach \($c in $conns\) { try { Stop-Process -Id $c.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction Stop } catch {} }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; Write-Output "=== import check \(new code\) ==="; .venv\\Scripts\\python.exe -c "import app.main; from app.core.enums import APPROVAL_CHAIN; print\('IMPORT OK; chain len =', len\(APPROVAL_CHAIN\)\)" 2>&1)

PowerShell($mysql="D:\\mysql-8.0.43-winx64\\bin\\mysql.exe"; $env:MYSQL_PWD="missyou1314..."; Write-Output "=== applying migration ==="; & $mysql -u root sd_publish_scm -e "source D:/1/backend/migrations/20260701_phase1_2_upgrade.sql" 2>&1; Write-Output "=== schema after migrate \(sys_user\) ==="; & $mysql -u root sd_publish_scm -e "SHOW COLUMNS FROM sys_user;" 2>&1; Write-Output "=== roles after remap ==="; & $mysql -u root sd_publish_scm -e "SELECT id,username,role,is_superuser FROM sys_user;" 2>&1)

PowerShell(Set-Location "D:\\1\\backend"; .venv\\Scripts\\python.exe -m app.db.init_db 2>&1; Write-Output "=== users now ==="; $mysql="D:\\mysql-8.0.43-winx64\\bin\\mysql.exe"; $env:MYSQL_PWD="missyou1314..."; & $mysql -u root sd_publish_scm -e "SELECT id,username,full_name,role,department,is_superuser,\(signature IS NOT NULL\) AS has_sig FROM sys_user ORDER BY id;" 2>&1)

PowerShell($mysql="D:\\mysql-8.0.43-winx64\\bin\\mysql.exe"; $env:MYSQL_PWD="missyou1314..."; & $mysql -u root sd_publish_scm -e "UPDATE sys_user SET signature=NULL WHERE username='op';" 2>&1; Set-Location "D:\\1\\backend"; .venv\\Scripts\\python.exe -c "from app.db.session import SessionLocal; from app.db.init_db import seed_users; db=SessionLocal\(\); seed_users\(db\); db.close\(\); print\('op signature restored'\)" 2>$null; & $mysql -u root sd_publish_scm -e "SELECT username,\(signature IS NOT NULL\) has_sig FROM sys_user WHERE username IN \('op','review','inv'\);" 2>&1)

PowerShell(Set-Location "D:\\1\\backend"; $c=Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; foreach\($x in $c\){ try{ Stop-Process -Id $x.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction Stop }catch{} }; Start-Sleep 2; $p=Start-Process -FilePath ".venv\\Scripts\\python.exe" -ArgumentList "-m","uvicorn","app.main:app","--host","127.0.0.1","--port","8000" -RedirectStandardOutput "backend_run2.log" -RedirectStandardError "backend_err2.log" -PassThru -WindowStyle Hidden; Start-Sleep 6; Get-Content "backend_err2.log" -Tail 4)

PowerShell(foreach\($f in @\("/","/src/main.js","/src/App.vue"\)\){ try { $r=Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5173$f" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 15; Write-Output "$f : OK \($\($r.StatusCode\)\)" } catch { Write-Output "$f : ERR $\($_.Exception.Message\)" } })
